steps.title: Convert the percent
steps.content: $10\%$ means $\frac{10}{100}$, or $0.10$. So $10\%$ of a number is found by multiplying that number by $0.10$.

steps.title: Select the matching value
steps.content: The value is $46$. Choice C is too large because it is close to $90\%$ of $460$, not $10\%$. The answer is B.
